options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <wireload_selection_group_name> # Specifies the name of the wireload selection group (string, required) <list_of_instances> # Specify the list of instances

options.name: -library
options.description: Specifies the name of the technology library to search for the wireload selection table

options.name: -max
options.description: Controls the choice of a wireload selection table only for the PVT max corner

options.name: -min
options.description: Controls the choice of a wireload selection table only for the minimum PVT corner
